title: grona capitata
intro: Grona capitata, also known as wild chamomile, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in apigenin and bisabolol, compounds known for their anti-inflammatory and calming effects. The health benefits of grona capitata include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Grona capitata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote a restful night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of insomnia.
